sentences.arabic: لَاحَظَتْ مَنَالُ أَنَّ شَعْرَهَا الْمَنْسُوجَ اخْتَلَّ فِي الصَّبَاحِ.
sentences.translation: Manal je primijetila da joj se pletenica rasplela ujutro.
sentences.translationEn: Manal noticed that her braid had come undone in the morning.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ أُمُّهَا ضَفَرَتْهُ بِعِنَايَةٍ فِي اللَّيْلِ.
sentences.translation: Majka joj ga je pažljivo oplela prethodne večeri.
sentences.translationEn: Her mother had carefully braided it the night before.

sentences.arabic: رَأَتْ قِطَّتَهَا تَنْظُرُ إِلَيْهَا بِعُيُونٍ بَرِيئَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Vidjela je mačku kako je gleda nevinim očima.
sentences.translationEn: She saw her cat looking at her with innocent eyes.

sentences.arabic: ظَنَّتْ أَنَّ الْقِطَّةَ لَعِبَتْ بِشَعْرِهَا وَهِيَ نَائِمَةٌ.
sentences.translation: Pomislila je da se mačka igrala s njenom kosom dok je spavala.
sentences.translationEn: She thought the cat had played with her hair while she was asleep.
